chapters.title: Of the Communication, Acceptance and Revocation of Proposals

sections.title: Definition of Contract
sections.summary: An agreement enforceable by law is a contract.
sections.example: A written agreement to sell a car for a specific price is a legally binding contract.

sections.title: What agreements are contracts
sections.summary: All agreements are contracts if they are made by the free consent of parties competent to contract.
sections.example: If both adults agree to a deal without being forced, it is a valid contract.

chapters.title: Of Contracts, Voidable Contracts and Void Agreements

sections.title: Who are competent to contract
sections.summary: Every person is competent to contract who is of the age of majority and of sound mind.
sections.example: A minor (under 18) cannot enter into a legally binding contract in most cases.
